notes.connections:
Keithley 0 (Power Supply)
    CH1 "3.3a" → 3.3 V, 1.5 A limit
    CH2 "3.3b" → 3.3 V, 1.5 A limit
    CH3 "P5V" → 5.0 V, 1.0 A limit
Hittite 0 RF_IN → SMA RF_IN (RF Band 2 input)
Hittite 1 LO    → SMA LO
FieldFox 0 RF   → SMA IF output (IF Mode)
notes.sources:
Keithley 0 – DUT power: 3.3a @ 3.3 V, 3.3b @ 3.3 V, P5V @ 5.0 V
Hittite 0 – RF input drive @ 5 GHz, -25 dBm (within RF Band 2: 3-13 GHz)
Hittite 1 – LO drive @ 11 GHz, -5 dBm
Keysight EL 0 – Electronic load (CH1 CC 0.1 A off, CH2 CR 10 kΩ on)
notes.monitoring:
Keithley 0 – Monitor supply currents on 3.3a / 3.3b / P5V
FieldFox 0 – IF output spectrum, center 6 GHz, span 10 GHz
    (USB sideband: IF = LO - RF = 11 - 5 = 6 GHz)
Keysight EL 0 – Monitor load currents / voltages
notes.general:
ADMV1420 Downconverter setup (per Memory Map / Side-By-Side view):
    RF Band Select : RF Band 2 (3 GHz to 13 GHz)
    IF Band Select : IF Low Band (1 GHz to 5 GHz)
    Output Select  : IF Mode (IF chain → DSA4/DSA5 → IF port)
    Sideband       : USB
Signal path: RF_IN → RF Band 2 amp → mixer (LO) → IF chain → IF output.
Power-on order: enable Keithley 0 supplies (3.3a, 3.3b, P5V) before applying LO / RF.
Program DUT via ACE macro (IF Mode, RF Band 2, IF Low Band, USB) before RF test.
